packageRules.description: Auto-merge minor/patch PRs when CI passes (7-day wait, stricter than the 3-day default)
Auto-open PRs for major updates; review manually

eslint-plugin-react (bundled via eslint-config-next) is not yet compatible with ESLint 10 - see https://github.com/jsx-eslint/eslint-plugin-react/issues/4018. Remove this rule once eslint-config-next ships support.

typescript-eslint (bundled via eslint-config-next) is not yet compatible with TypeScript 7 - see https://github.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/10940 and https://github.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/12518. Remove this rule once typescript-eslint ships support.
